title: Ismail I becomes Safavid shah
fact: Ismail I was the founder and first shah of Safavid Iran, ruling from 1501 until his death in 1524.

title: Tahmasp I becomes Safavid shah
fact: Tahmasp I was the second shah of Safavid Iran from 1524 until his death in 1576.

title: Abbas the Great becomes Safavid shah
fact: Abbas I, commonly known as Abbas the Great, was the fifth Safavid shah of Iran from 1588 to 1629.

title: Abbas III becomes Safavid shah
fact: Abbas III was a son of Shah Tahmasp II and Shahpari Begum of the Safavid dynasty and reigned from 1732 to 1736.

title: Tahmasp II becomes Safavid shah
fact: Tahmasp II was the penultimate Safavid shah of Iran, ruling from 1722 to 1732.

title: Sultan Husayn becomes Safavid shah
fact: Soltan Hoseyn was the Safavid shah of Iran from 1694 to 1722.

title: Abbas II of Persia becomes Safavid shah
fact: Abbas II was the seventh Shah of Safavid Iran, ruling from 1642 to 1666.

title: Mohammad Khodabanda becomes Safavid shah
fact: Mohammad Khodabanda was the fourth Safavid shah of Iran from 1578 until his overthrow in 1587 by his son Abbas I.

title: Safi of Persia becomes Safavid shah
fact: Sam Mirza, known by his dynastic name of Shah Safi, was the sixth shah of Safavid Iran, ruling from 1629 to 1642.

title: Ismail II becomes Safavid shah
fact: Ismail II was the third shah of Safavid Iran from 1576 to 1577.

title: Suleiman I of Persia becomes Safavid shah
fact: Suleiman I was the eighth Shah of Safavid Iran from 1666 to 1694.
